item.title: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.

item.title: 👍Tammy Fellin - Department of Labor & Industries
item.description: Tammy Fellin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Department of Labor & Industries.

item.title: ❓Rachel Hamar - Washington State Association for Justice
item.description: Rachel Hamar signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association for Justice.

item.title: ❓💵Carissa Larsen - Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO
item.description: Carissa Larsen signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO. They are a registered lobbyist.
